# NetWise — B2B & Wholesale Shopify App

> NetWise is the #1 B2B and wholesale Shopify app that transforms any Shopify store into a powerful B2B platform.

## What is NetWise?

NetWise is a Shopify app that enables merchants to sell wholesale and B2B directly from their existing Shopify store. It provides volume-based pricing, bulk ordering, net payment terms, shipping rules, customer registration, and a smart cart — all without needing a separate wholesale store.

## Key Features

- **B2B Pricing**: Set custom volume-based pricing tiers with automatic discounts for wholesale buyers. Support for quantity breaks, customer group pricing, and percentage/fixed discounts.
- **Smart Cart**: A powerful cart drawer with SKU search, bulk add, variant selection, and real-time pricing. Replaces Shopify's default cart for B2B customers.
- **Bulk Orders**: Quick order forms and CSV upload for large orders. Customers can add hundreds of items efficiently.
- **Net Terms**: Offer Net 30/60/90 payment terms for approved business accounts. Invoicing and payment tracking built in.
- **Shipping Rules**: Custom shipping rates, free shipping thresholds, and carrier rules for B2B orders.
- **Customer Registration**: B2B application form for new wholesale customers. Custom fields, document upload, and approval workflow.
- **Custom Catalogs**: Show different products and prices to different customer groups.

## Pricing

- 60-day free trial
- One plan with everything included
- Available on the Shopify App Store: https://apps.shopify.com/netwise

## Technical Details

- Platform: Shopify
- Integration: Works with Shopify's theme app extensions
- Compatible with: All Shopify plans (Basic, Shopify, Advanced, Plus)
- Uses Shopify's new customer account system
